title: rhus osterhoutii
intro: Rhus osterhoutii, also known as the desert sumac, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rhus osterhoutii include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds and skin conditions, and support the immune system. Rhus osterhoutii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk remedies for its purported health benefits.
